name: AllplanVersion
summary: Class for extraction of Allplan version information

methods.name: MainReleaseName
methods.summary: Get the Allplan main release name Returns: Allplan main release name ('2016', '2017', ...)
methods.remarks: Get the Allplan main release name Returns: Allplan main release name ('2016', '2017', ...)

methods.name: SubReleaseName
methods.summary: Get the Allplan sub release name Returns: Allplan sub release name ('2016.0', '2016.1', ...)
methods.remarks: Get the Allplan sub release name Returns: Allplan sub release name ('2016.0', '2016.1', ...)

methods.name: Version
methods.summary: Get the Allplan version as string Returns: Allplan version 2016.1 2016: Allplan main version .1: Allplan sub version 2016.1.1 2016: Allplan main version .1.1: Allplan sub version
methods.remarks: Get the Allplan version as string Returns: Allplan version 2016.1 2016: Allplan main version .1: Allplan sub version 2016.1.1 2016: Allplan main version .1.1: Allplan sub version

methods.name: WindowsReleaseName
methods.summary: Get the Allplan window release name Returns: 'P' for project version or empty string for the normal version
methods.remarks: Get the Allplan window release name Returns: 'P' for project version or empty string for the normal version
